commands.cmd: read-only planner authorization, query, state, privacy, preview and accessibility review

summary: Approved a max-five-query per-person planner projection with exact confirmed totals and preview-only visibility, retaining allocations and prepared controls.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same review as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: The bounded planner projection and preview rendering must be delivered and audited.
Household analysis/charts, documentation and rendered final evidence remain.
